title: Beta expansion integration signoff
summary: Run a final integration proof after the twelve-packet beta expansion runway finishes, recording tests, browser proof, and remaining blockers.

execution_order.goal: Define the integration checklist across lane 1 systems, lane 2 content, lane 3 spatial work, and lane 4 routes.
execution_order.why_now: A much larger push needs one closing proof instead of cross-lane gates throughout.

execution_order.goal: Run the final integration proof and write the signoff report.
execution_order.why_now: The director needs a clean pass/fail read before opening another large phase.

execution_order.goal: Review the integration signoff and name any smallest remaining blockers.
execution_order.why_now: The push should close with explicit evidence, not vibes.

completion_gate: All lane packets in this wave have clean critic review or explicit blockers.
Final report records agent validation, full tests, science check, build, browser proof needs, and remaining risk.
No hidden follow-up is left out of the queue.
guardrails: Integration proof only unless a tiny blocker fix is explicitly scoped.
Do not add gameplay features during signoff.
Do not hide known issues in prose.
Open only smallest follow-up blockers if needed.
post_packet_path: If clean, the next director decision can choose between a new chapter-grade route or a release candidate pass.
If not clean, fix blockers before opening breadth.
